headline: Ethereum Energy Use Plunges 99% Post Merge

article.title: Cambridge study puts Ethereum near the lower end of PoS energy intensity
article.summary: Cambridge estimated that Ethereum consumes 7.87 GWh annually and has the second-lowest market-value-adjusted energy intensity among the PoS networks studied.

headline: Oil Surges 5% as Hormuz Strait Closure Looms

article.title: US-Iran Strikes Ratchet Up Tensions as Tehran Says Hormuz Shut
article.summary: US forces struck Iran for a third time in a week, prompting retaliatory attacks on at least five Arab nations as Tehran declared the Strait of Hormuz closed “until further notice.”

headline: Oil Shipping Unfazed Amid $100B Daily Hormuz Transit

article.title: Hormuz Route Open Despite Iran Declaration, Maritime Group Says
article.summary: The Strait of Hormuz’s southern route remained open to shipping on Sunday despite Iran declaring the waterway closed as tit-for-tat attacks between the US and Tehran escalated, a maritime advisory group said.

headline: Circle Gains OCC Nod For National Bank Charter

article.title: Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Circle (CRCL) Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
Circle won final OCC approval to establish a national trust bank, allowing it to place USDC reserves under federal oversight and expanding its regulated digital asset custody business.
